summary: Successfully tested Daily Sales Report, Marketplace Integration, and Customer Options APIs and UI components. All 16 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verification confirms all dashboard tabs and components are working correctly.

issues: Locations section appears duplicated (shown twice) - minor UI duplication

ui_components: Summary cards (Total Sales $124.97, Total Orders 4, Avg Order $31.24, Items Sold 5)
Hourly sales distribution chart with 24-hour bars

endpoints: GET /api/marketplace-link/available - Returns user's available listings to link
ui_components: Header with listing count (0 listings linked)
Linked Listings section with empty state

endpoints: GET /api/customer-options/{page_id}/options - Returns order types, locations, delivery settings
GET /api/customer-options/{page_id}/map-data - Public endpoint for Google Maps
ui_components: Order Types section with 5 options (Dine In, Drive Thru, Pickup, Delivery, Shipping)
Each order type has icon, label, description, and toggle
Locations section with Add Location button
Add Location modal with all form fields (name, address, city, state, postal code, country, phone, email, latitude, longitude)

action_items: Minor: Fix duplicate Locations section in CustomerOptionsManager.jsx (appears twice)
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Daily Sales Report API correctly aggregates order data by date with hourly distribution
✓ Marketplace Integration APIs properly verify page and listing ownership before linking
✓ Customer Options API works for both public (published pages) and owner (unpublished pages) views
✓ All UI components have proper data-testid attributes for testing
✓ Google Maps embed uses proper API key and coordinates formatting
seed_data_creation: Used existing POS transactions from previous testing (4 orders totaling $124.97)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Daily Sales Report, Marketplace Integration, and Customer Options features are fully functional. Dashboard has all 10 tabs: Overview, Products, POS, Inventory, Scanner, Orders, Reports, Marketplace, Delivery, Settings. Daily report shows real transaction data ($124.97 total, peak hour 10 AM). Note: Locations section in CustomerOptionsManager appears duplicated - minor UI bug.
